plugins.name: integrate-claudecode
plugins.description: Integrate Claude Code into a Docker/VSCode Devcontainer project.

plugins.name: sdd-setup
plugins.description: Skills for scaffolding and configuring VS Code devcontainer projects: create new projects, add Claude Code, add Beads issue tracking, and add the OpenSpec CLI.

plugins.name: sdd-workflow
plugins.description: A suite of workflow skills for OpenSpec/Beads-driven development: distill workflows, generate roadmaps, create Beads task graphs, drive implementation, and audit spec completion.

plugins.name: project-discovery
plugins.description: Technical due diligence for open-source projects: health scorecard, architecture analysis, competitive landscape, and disposition recommendation — with interactive goal-scoping and focused deep-dive reports.
